reviews.review_description: I’m sure if I can get it to work, it’s a great game, but whenever I say it can place down the mysterious device, something transparent red spans in and won’t do anything while making an obnoxious sound. Sometimes I can move it but not really.
looks like a great game from the trailer, but i cant place the computer down to start the game, it stays red and transparent and wont let me move it 💔💔

I had fun when I first played this game. Ever since then it doesn’t allow me to place the computer to start the game I’ve tried several different rooms and restarting the game nothing works. The computer stays red and transparent not allowing me to move or place it.

Absolutely stunning game with 3D puzzles to test your puzzling skills, these puzzles will test your skills the deeper into the game you get! 

Play them in Mixed Reality with a future themed atmosphere. 

You can earn items along the way! It was so cool hanging pictures on my actual walls, and when returning to the game boom the pictures are still there, like you’re just stepping back into this futuristic themed puzzle game! 

I had the opportunity to play this in the Beta stages and I can tell you it’s come a long way and the developers have worked so hard on this, and it’s FREE! and boy are you in for a treat because it’s top notch just like their series of Retropolis puzzle games! 

Well done devs great job! 🙌

I really like this game. There are some puzzles you have to solve, you can get credits for them and then buy mixed reality objects that you can put on your environment.
There are many, between them I choosed also a rainy cloud and doing the puzzles with the sound of the rain was really relaxing.
The game is not long and is quite simple but I rarely saw such well made apps in the app lab (and also in the official store), and this it's free!
So, why are you wanting for? Just download it and enjoy!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your lovely review! We're glad you're enjoying the game and finding the mixed reality objects relaxing. Appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy!

reviews.review_description: From the makers of Retropolis, this is a great little mixed reality puzzle game set in the same universe. Easy to pick up and fun to play, and you earn in-game currency to buy posters and other items to decorate your room. Well worth picking up, and check out Retropolis and its sequel, too, they are excellent games (there's an ad for them in this game after you complete the tutorial).

developer_response.body: Thanks for your fantastic review! We're delighted you're enjoying the mixed reality puzzle experience in the Retropolis universe. Appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy our games!

reviews.review_description:
Being free I didn't expect much. I was wrong. 
This was such a nice little surprise.
MR implementation is awesome. You earn money for solving puzzles and you're then free to spend it on various MR objects that you can place in your room. 
And the best part? Even if you leave the game, objects will stay on their place in your room, once you'll return. 
Puzzles are fun to solve as well. They start off really easy but gradually become more complex. It's so relaxing.

Just two things: 
- First, I'm not sure puzzles need that orb around them. They would look better standalone, I think.
- And two... I need more! I'd pay for a full version with more puzzles, more story and MR goodness.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the glowing review! We're thrilled you enjoyed the MR experience and the surprises it offers. Your feedback on the puzzles is duly noted. Stay tuned for updates, and who knows? More puzzles and MR goodness might just be on the way!

reviews.review_title: Great free puzzle game in mixed reality
reviews.review_description: Played this as a huge fan of the retropolis games (seriously go play them if you like narrative driven games) but didnt expect much from a  puzzle game released for free - I was wrong to doubt, these guys know how to make full use of VR and 3D. Its not a huge game (took me just over an hour) but the use of mixed reality + the interactive rotatable 3D puzzles is really well done, well designed puzzlss.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying out our game and for your positive feedback! We're thrilled you enjoyed the mixed reality experience and the interactive puzzles. Appreciate your support and hope you continue to enjoy our games!

reviews.review_title: An hour of puzzling well spent
reviews.review_description:
Took me 70 minutes to finish. Good puzzle interaction. 
Unfortunately, if you are in a bright room, the contrast with the puzzle grid can be a bit low.
But altogether a great little puzzler!

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! Glad you enjoyed the puzzling. We'll look into improving the contrast for bright rooms. Appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: A simple puzzle mechanic combined with a light narrative makes a relaxing game that I highly recommend trying. Mixed reality interactions like placing posters and stuff on your walls after completing a level adds an motivation to continue playing the game.

reviews.review_title: Great game and great dev team
reviews.review_description: I've talked with the devs, and they are really nice people, and all of the games are spectacular.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the support and kind words! We're thrilled you enjoy dot.Line and it's great to be in contact with you as part of our community. Stay tuned for more!

reviews.review_description: I was having a bad stream, and nothing felt right. I put this on and was instantly in love. The MR works so well, and the gameplay is challenging yet fun, and it's totally free. A must-have on any gamers library
my first mixed reality game... very chill doing puzzles while still being able to see and chat to my partner. Fun and free. no brainer

developer_response.body: Glad you had fun with our game! Thanks for giving mixed reality a try and enjoying the puzzles. Appreciate your support!

reviews.review_description: For me it was fun and unique VR/AR experience. loved it

But... I dont see a talking hologram on the computer... only his legs
...

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. Happy you liked the game. Regarding the visual glitch you're describing - could you please record a video of it and send it to our support email? We'd be happy to take a look and solve this issue.

reviews.review_description:
It's not a unique concept: connect the lines. Sometimes in 3D.
What sets this apart is the ability to manipulate the play space. The MR items are almost a gimmick, but a cool one at that.
I really want to see what post early access looks like for this, or if we'll get more updates. I have no interest in your RPG, I need more of this!
